summary: Full backend + frontend E2E verification of Roast My Startup V1. Backend: 20/20 pytest cases passing across public endpoints, roast generation, lead capture, JWT auth, and admin (leads list/filter/sort/stats/CSV export). Frontend: Home loads with hero + 6 example cards, /roast form flow works (industry shadcn select, level picker), score reveal + lead capture wall unlocks full roast, share bar (copy/share/download/another) all present, admin login/redirect/dashboard/filters/search/logout all functional, mobile 375px has zero horizontal overflow.

minor.issue: FastAPI on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated — prefer lifespan context manager. Not blocking V1.

critical_code_review_comments: calc_priority returns MEDIUM for both '(site|li) + detailed' and '(site|li|detailed) alone' — second branch collapses LOW-ish leads into MEDIUM. Consider tightening so single signal stays LOW unless detailed description provided. Not a blocker but reduces lead-priority signal value.
score_category mapping has a 1-point gap (e.g., 30 is Danger Zone, 31 Needs Work — fine; but using exclusive ranges is more explicit). Currently OK.
JWT secret read from .env is reasonable but consider rotation strategy for prod.

CORS allow_origins='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec (browsers ignore credentials with wildcard). Acceptable for current preview since no cookies/credentials are used; tighten before prod.
Admin login has no rate limiting / brute-force lockout. Spec note mentioned 5-fail lockout — not implemented. Low priority for V1 internal admin but worth adding before public exposure.
FastAPI deprecation: @app.on_event is deprecated; migrate to lifespan handler.
server.py is ~400 lines and mixes auth, models, public endpoints, admin endpoints, and startup hooks — would benefit from splitting into routers/auth modules once feature set grows.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed roast + lead via API/UI to validate flows. Not cleaned up — does not impact production data (using TEST_ prefix per guidelines).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and pass 20/20. Frontend roast flow requires shadcn Select interaction (click select-industry, wait 400ms, click first [role='option']). Lead-challenge is also a shadcn Select. Score animates from 0 to actual value — assert on score-value after animation completes (~1s) if needed. Admin token stored in localStorage under 'rms_admin_token'.
